source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for sharp English command UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for compact Japanese labels, status tables, and multilingual operations dashboards.
layout: Dense 8px command grids, black-feather headers, crest-like vertical navigation, crisp feather dividers, 8px component radius, restrained shadows, and canopy-green focus states.

prompts.label: Transparent harpy eagle motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Harpy Eagle transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a harpy eagle crest motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single powerful bird portrait cutout on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A harpy eagle bust and upper body with accurate anatomy, commanding forward-facing posture, raised double crest feathers, slate gray crown and wings, white facial disk and chest, black feather collar band, hooked dark beak, intense eyes, layered feather texture, strong talon hint tucked below. Natural feather detail, crisp subject edges, distinctive silhouette, no extra birds.
Composition/framing: centered complete portrait cutout with generous padding; full crest, head, shoulders, upper chest and a hint of talons visible, not cropped. Clean studio lighting that preserves gray, white, black, and subtle canopy-green reflected tones. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no rainforest scene, no branch, no props, no text, no watermark, no second subject, no cartoon, no floor plane, no shadow.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Harpy Eagle light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Harpy Eagle", derived from a harpy eagle crest motif: slate gray feathers, white chest and facial disk, black collar band, hooked command presence, and rainforest canopy green context. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible powerful command system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 3840x2160 composition, clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Harpy Eagle, Harpy Eagle, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from raised harpy eagle crest feathers, layered gray wing structure, white facial/chest highlights, black collar band and beak, intense eye focus, and rainforest canopy green shadows. The board must read as harpy eagle crest and canopy command, not generic eagle, owl, military, or sports branding.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: icon buttons, primary and secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, left navigation rail, top command bar, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product dashboard, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, powerful command UI, white and mist-gray surfaces, charcoal feather dividers, black command header, canopy green sidebars and focus states, feather-bar texture, sharp hierarchy, dense but readable operations console.
Color palette: feather white #f4f5f1, cloud gray #d9ddd9, slate crest #727a78, wing graphite #2b2f2f, collar black #101313, canopy green #1f4a36, moss signal #55745c, talon ochre #b79a58, command ink #171a1a.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Harpy Eagle", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Harpy Eagle dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Harpy Eagle". It must feel like the same light-mode harpy eagle command system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from raised harpy eagle crest feathers, gray-white-black plumage, intense command posture, and rainforest canopy green context.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 3840x2160 composition, clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Harpy Eagle, Harpy Eagle, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the harpy eagle system language: deep graphite and black-feather backgrounds, feather-white foreground text, slate crest active states, canopy-green sidebars and focus rings, moss status colors, talon-ochre warning accents, crisp feather-bar dividers, precise command surfaces. Must read as harpy eagle crest and rainforest canopy, not generic eagle, owl, military, or sports branding.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: icon buttons, primary and secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, left navigation rail, top command bar, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: near-black collar backgrounds, graphite cards, white feather text and hairline dividers, slate gray controls, canopy-green focus rings, moss and ochre chart highlights, restrained contrast, crisp shadcn/tweakcn components, 8px grid, 8px card radius, powerful command console feel.
Color palette: collar black #101313, wing graphite #1b2020, deep slate #2b2f2f, crest gray #727a78, feather white #f4f5f1, canopy green #1f4a36, moss signal #6f8a70, talon ochre #c2a15d, storm border #3a4240.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Harpy Eagle".
